name: Spaghetti Squash on Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Place the spaghetti squash cut-side down in a baking tray with about half an inch of water.
3. Bake until the squash is soft and stringy, about 30-40 minutes.
4. Scoop out the squash contents into a plastic lunch box.
5. On top of the contents, add one can of diced Italian tomatoes.
6. At work: Mix everything together in the lunch box and heat for 3 minutes on high.
